added.title: The Exiles
added.description: Fleeing the evil Chancellor Nuro, Iyanu meets the Corrupt Divine Beast Ekun and a mysterious boy named Biyi. As she uncovers her extraordinary powers, she also explores hidden treasures beyond the Walls of Elu.

added.title: The Sacred
added.description: Iyanu, Biyi, Toye and Ekun reach The Source Mountain and meet the Guardians. Iyanu must pass the three Trials to prove she's the Chosen. Meanwhile, Chancellor Nuro, possessed by the Fallen One, tracks them across the Rinku Plains to stop her.

added.title: Soar Losers
added.description: Only 3 campers remain and if any of them live through the final challenge they might win the 1 million dollars Chris promised them. But on Total Drama Island promises are a lot like bones; they're often broken.

added.title: Meet the Victims
added.description: Chris welcomes 16 new campers back to the original island and divides them into two teams who face-off in a blindfolded challenge that's sure to cause pain.

added.title: Pirates of the Cabbagean
added.description: Our two teams go to war, firing cabbages from cannons at each other from their respective pirate ships. The first team to sink the other will be the winner, but someone takes a very personal interest in one specific target.

added.title: Drown Town Abbey
added.description: Each team has a member placed into a clear glass tank that is locked and slowly filling with water. In order to free them, they must retrieve the codes at the far end of a very dangerous obstacle course.

added.title: Numbskull Island
added.description: It's just a normal game of capture the flag… except the flag is a skull, and your opponents are armed with fire hoses, toilet plunger harpoons and giant rolling boulders… which is nothing like capture the flag.

added.title: Jurassic Fart
added.description: After an all-bean breakfast the teams must cross the island in silence to avoid being eaten by raptors. That's right, this episode has dinosaurs... and lots of farting. The first team to reach the other side claims victory.

added.title: Launch Back of Notre Game
added.description: Catapult your team member into distant scoring zones to earn points but if you miss you'll be landing in a penalty zone filled with all kind of evil. The first team to reach 10,000 points wins. The losing team, as always, will be sending someone home.

added.title: Severe Eggs & Pains
added.description: Chris responds to the network's ask for a holiday special by making the campers hunt for eggs. With the teams now merged it's all about being the first one back with an egg and winning immunity. Well, and not getting gutted by a giant bird.

added.title: The Wheel of Vomit
added.description: Chef finally gets to show off his fancy culinary skills in an eating challenge where each dish is a tastebud's nightmare. The last camper still eating wins immunity. The rest are all up for elimination.

added.title: Paddle Field Earth
added.description: Today's challenge involves canoeing, hiking and mountain climbing. It's just like normal summer camp!! Except that you canoe over a waterfall, hike through a geyser field and climb a mountain that's actually the world's biggest beehive. It's nothing like summer camp.

added.title: Subway
added.description: The Bears are stranded on a subway platform after missing their train. But while waiting, the Bears are challenged with recovering some lost items.

added.title: Panda's Friend
added.description: Panda uses an app to find a friend with whom he has more common with. Soon things take a turn for the worse when the new friend gets too possessive.
The Baby Bears' dreams come true when they find a 100 dollar bill. But when they can't bear to spend it, they realize it's difficult to let go.

added.title: Neighbors
added.description: Some new neighbors set up camp next to the Bears' cave. Panda and Ice love it, but Grizz thinks they're up to no good.

added.title: Professor Lampwick
added.description: Chloe's professor is too mean to give her any face time to talk over her poor grade. The Bears take things into their own hands to help, causing big trouble for Chloe.

added.title: Ralph
added.description: Charlie meets a creature just like him named Ralph. Charlie loves having a new friend, but the Bears think Ralph is bad news.

added.title: Planet Bears
added.description: A nature documentary follows the Bears through their normal routine, which includes a trip to the grocery store.

added.title: Coffee Cave
added.description: After finding out Ice Bear is a master barista, the Bears turn their cave into a popular coffee shop. But it all goes awry when Ice Bear gets too into coffee and goes berserk.

added.title: Charlie's Big Foot
added.description: After Charlie hurts his foot, The Bears have to sneak him into a hospital for medical assistance.

added.title: The Demon
added.description: Chloe and Ice Bear accidentally lose Chloe's prized hoodie to the ferocious dog next store. They go on a mission to get it back.

added.title: Chapter 6: Miracle Rabbit
added.description: Oscar and Ramona run an errand on the moon.

added.title: Chapter 7: The Three Grrs
added.description: Oscar helps the aliens with a special jester ritual that happens once every fifty years.

added.title: Chapter 8: Go Get Our Girls
added.description: Hedgehog and Oscar search for the missing coven members.

added.title: Chapter 9: Storybook Susie
added.description: Susie details her travels around the world.

added.title: Chapter 10: The Last Witch
added.description: Hedgehog worries that she may be too little to make big witch decisions.

added.title: Stinkorama
added.description: The spies land in a real stink when durians, the 'King of Fruit,' come alive and attack them! With durians on the rampage, things get worse when Alex's loyalties are tested and Clover is distracted about where to take her date.
